# Copilot Instructions

## Guidelines

- Follow the user's requirements carefully and to the letter
- Provide concise, focused solutions without unnecessary verbosity
- Maintain code quality and adherence to project standards
- Ask for clarification only when absolutely necessary
- Make changes that are directly related to the user's request

## Code Style

- Use consistent formatting and indentation
- Follow the existing code conventions in the repository
- Write readable and maintainable code
- Include comments for complex logic

## Best Practices

- Test suggestions before proposing changes
- Consider performance and scalability implications
- Avoid deprecated patterns or methods
- Keep security best practices in mind
- Respect existing architectural patterns

## Communication

- Be direct and to the point
- Provide explanations only when necessary
- Highlight breaking changes or important considerations
- Suggest alternatives when there are multiple valid approaches
